category_sources: Official IT++ documentation describes a C++ library for mathematical, signal processing, and communication classes and functions.
source_facts.description says it is a library of math, signal, and communication classes and functions.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title and about section use IT++.
source_facts.homepage is the IT++ SourceForge site.
docs_sources: Official IT++ Doxygen documentation includes getting started, modules, classes, files, installation, and tutorials.
Official development installation page documents obtaining and building IT++ source.
repo_sources: Official IT++ documentation links to the SourceForge Git Repository.
SourceForge project provides the IT++ Git tree.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official IT++ about section states its main use is simulation of communication systems and communications research.
source_facts.description identifies math, signal, and communication functionality.
